race.comment: SON OF EUREKA (7) raced handy and held his ground when fresh from a spell over 1100m at Dubbo last time out. Strips fitter and the engagement of Aaron Bullock adds to the confidence. FLYING MOLLY (11) led and gave a great sight but was nabbed close to home over this trip at Scone recently. Very fit mare who will be prominent for a long way. MASTER GEE (2) has been on the placegetters' heels in two runs this prep, both over 1000m here. Crying out for 1200m now. Look for him chiming in late. LYON (8) impressively broke his maiden over today's track and trip three weeks ago. Lightly raced three-year-old who is ready to take this next step. REPRISAL (10) is fitter for two runs back from a spell and draws a far better gate this time. Ready to find something like his best.
